name: Battle of Hastings
summary: William the Conqueror defeated King Harold II, leading to the Norman conquest of England and a major transformation of English society and governance.

name: Battle of Stamford Bridge
summary: King Harold II defeated the invading Norwegian forces led by King Harald Hardrada, ending the Viking Age invasions of England.

name: William the Conqueror Crowned King of England
summary: William of Normandy was crowned King of England, solidifying Norman rule and reshaping the English monarchy and aristocracy.

name: Halley's Comet Appears
summary: Halley’s Comet was visible across Europe and was interpreted as an omen, famously depicted in the Bayeux Tapestry in connection with the Norman Conquest.

name: Battle of Fulford
summary: Norwegian forces led by Harald Hardrada defeated English earls Edwin and Morcar, capturing York shortly before the Battle of Stamford Bridge.

name: Song Dynasty Reforms Continue
summary: The Song Dynasty continued administrative and economic reforms, strengthening governance and promoting economic growth in imperial China.

name: Seljuk Expansion in the Middle East
summary: The Seljuk Turks expanded their influence in the Middle East, exercising power over the Abbasid Caliphate and shaping regional politics.
